categories.name: Career Development

activities.name: Review and update your resume
activities.description: Refresh your resume with recent achievements, updated skills, and stronger action verbs to stay interview-ready.

activities.name: Update your LinkedIn profile
activities.description: Polish your headline, summary, and experience sections to attract recruiters and grow your professional network.

activities.name: Create a professional development plan
activities.description: Map out the skills, certifications, and milestones you need to reach your next career goal within a clear timeline.

activities.name: Learn about leadership principles
activities.description: Study foundational leadership frameworks and management styles to prepare yourself for guiding teams effectively.

activities.name: Create a career roadmap
activities.description: Chart your long-term career trajectory with key milestones, alternative paths, and actionable next steps.

activities.name: Research companies you'd like to work for
activities.description: Investigate company culture, mission, and growth opportunities at organisations that align with your career values.

activities.name: Practice answering common interview questions
activities.description: Rehearse concise, compelling answers to behavioural and technical questions so you perform confidently under pressure.

activities.name: Attend a virtual networking event
activities.description: Join an online industry meetup or webinar to make new connections and stay current with trends in your field.

activities.name: Learn about salary negotiation techniques
activities.description: Master strategies for anchoring, framing, and countering offers so you can advocate for fair compensation.

activities.name: Create or update your professional portfolio
activities.description: Curate your best projects, case studies, and work samples into a polished showcase of your capabilities.

activities.name: Research industry salary benchmarks
activities.description: Use salary databases and reports to understand competitive pay ranges for your role, experience, and location.

activities.name: Create an elevator pitch for yourself
activities.description: Craft a concise 30-second introduction that communicates who you are, what you do, and the value you bring.

activities.name: Learn about remote work best practices
activities.description: Discover proven strategies for staying productive, setting boundaries, and collaborating effectively from home.

activities.name: Develop your personal brand statement
activities.description: Define what makes you unique professionally and distil it into a memorable brand that resonates across platforms.

categories.description: Invest in your professional future. These activities help you build skills, expand your network, and position yourself for new opportunities in your career.

categories.name: Organization

activities.name: Organize your workspace
activities.description: Clear clutter, arrange essentials within reach, and create an environment that encourages focus and creativity.

activities.name: Clean up your computer files
activities.description: Sort through downloads, delete duplicates, and organise documents into a logical folder structure you can navigate quickly.

activities.name: Create a to-do list for the week
activities.description: Plan your upcoming tasks by priority and deadline so nothing important slips through the cracks.

activities.name: Set up a filing system
activities.description: Design a consistent physical or digital filing structure that makes storing and retrieving documents effortless.

activities.name: Organize your email inbox
activities.description: Unsubscribe from noise, set up filters and labels, and reach inbox zero for a calmer digital workflow.

activities.name: Declutter your digital workspace
activities.description: Remove unused apps, tidy your desktop, and consolidate scattered files into a streamlined digital environment.

activities.name: Create a document naming convention system
activities.description: Establish clear, consistent naming rules for your files so you can find any document in seconds.

activities.name: Set up a password manager
activities.description: Choose and configure a password manager to generate strong, unique passwords and keep all your accounts secure.

activities.name: Organize your browser bookmarks
activities.description: Sort saved links into themed folders, remove dead bookmarks, and create a curated library of your go-to resources.

activities.name: Create a system for tracking important dates
activities.description: Set up calendar reminders and recurring events so you never miss birthdays, renewals, or key deadlines.

activities.name: Digitize important paper documents
activities.description: Scan and back up critical paperwork like contracts, receipts, and IDs for safe, searchable digital storage.

activities.name: Create a meal planning system
activities.description: Build a weekly meal template that simplifies grocery shopping, reduces food waste, and supports healthier eating.

activities.name: Organize your phone apps into folders
activities.description: Group apps by purpose, remove ones you never use, and arrange your home screen for faster, distraction-free access.

activities.name: Set up a household inventory
activities.description: Catalogue valuable belongings with photos and serial numbers for insurance claims and peace of mind.

categories.description: Bring order to your world and free up mental energy. From decluttering your workspace to streamlining your digital life, these tasks help you work smarter and feel more in control.

categories.name: Skills

activities.name: Learn a new Excel/Google Sheets function
activities.description: Pick a powerful function like VLOOKUP, INDEX-MATCH, or QUERY and practise using it on real data.

activities.name: Practice typing speed exercises
activities.description: Use a typing trainer to boost your words-per-minute and accuracy, saving time on every task you type.

activities.name: Learn keyboard shortcuts for your OS
activities.description: Memorise essential shortcuts for window management, navigation, and common actions to work faster without the mouse.

activities.name: Learn basic coding concepts
activities.description: Explore variables, loops, and functions through beginner-friendly tutorials to understand how software works.

activities.name: Practice public speaking
activities.description: Record yourself delivering a short talk, review it for filler words and pacing, and rehearse until it feels natural.

activities.name: Learn basic photo editing
activities.description: Get comfortable with cropping, colour correction, and retouching using free tools like GIMP or Canva.

activities.name: Improve your writing skills with exercises
activities.description: Practise concise writing, active voice, and clear structure through short daily exercises that sharpen your communication.

activities.name: Learn to create effective presentations
activities.description: Study slide design principles, storytelling techniques, and data visualisation to deliver presentations that persuade.

activities.name: Practice active listening techniques
activities.description: Train yourself to fully focus, reflect, and respond thoughtfully in conversations to build stronger relationships.

activities.name: Learn basic video editing
activities.description: Cut, trim, and add transitions to footage using free editors like DaVinci Resolve or CapCut.

activities.name: Learn data visualization basics
activities.description: Understand chart types, colour theory, and storytelling with data to turn numbers into compelling visuals.

activities.name: Practice speed reading techniques
activities.description: Try chunking, minimising sub-vocalisation, and using a pacer to increase your reading speed without losing comprehension.

activities.name: Learn project management fundamentals
activities.description: Explore methodologies like Agile, Scrum, and Kanban to plan, track, and deliver projects more efficiently.

activities.name: Study design thinking principles
activities.description: Learn the empathise–define–ideate–prototype–test framework to solve problems creatively and user-centrically.

categories.description: Develop practical abilities that pay off in everyday life. These hands-on activities build competence and confidence across a wide range of useful disciplines.

categories.name: Financial

activities.name: Create a budget spreadsheet
activities.description: Build a clear income-vs-expenses tracker that reveals exactly where your money goes each month.

activities.name: Learn about investing basics
activities.description: Understand stocks, bonds, ETFs, and compound interest so you can start growing your wealth with confidence.

activities.name: Learn about financial planning
activities.description: Explore goal-setting, savings strategies, and long-term planning to build a roadmap for financial security.

activities.name: Learn about business analytics
activities.description: Discover how data-driven insights and KPIs are used to make smarter business decisions and measure success.

activities.name: Create a personal productivity system
activities.description: Design a workflow combining task management, time blocking, and review cycles that keeps you consistently productive.

activities.name: Review your credit report
activities.description: Check your credit report for errors, understand your score factors, and take steps to improve your creditworthiness.

activities.name: Set up automatic bill payments
activities.description: Configure autopay for recurring bills to avoid late fees, protect your credit score, and simplify your finances.

activities.name: Research retirement savings options
activities.description: Compare pensions, ISAs, 401(k)s, and other retirement vehicles to find the best fit for your future goals.

activities.name: Learn about tax deductions you may qualify for
activities.description: Identify deductions and credits you might be missing to legally reduce your tax burden and keep more of your income.

activities.name: Create an emergency fund savings plan
activities.description: Calculate your target amount, set a monthly savings goal, and automate contributions to build a financial safety net.

activities.name: Research side hustle opportunities
activities.description: Explore freelancing, online selling, or gig work that aligns with your skills and can supplement your main income.

activities.name: Learn about cryptocurrency basics
activities.description: Understand blockchain technology, major coins, and the risks and opportunities of digital asset investing.

activities.name: Create a debt repayment plan
activities.description: List your debts, choose the avalanche or snowball method, and build a realistic schedule to become debt-free.

activities.name: Research passive income streams
activities.description: Investigate dividend investing, rental income, digital products, and other ways to earn money with less active effort.

categories.description: Take charge of your financial health. Whether you are budgeting, investing, or learning about money management, these activities help you build a more secure and intentional financial future.

categories.name: Personal Growth

activities.name: Practice mindfulness for focus
activities.description: Spend 10–15 minutes on guided meditation or breathing exercises to sharpen concentration and reduce mental noise.

activities.name: Learn about emotional intelligence
activities.description: Study the five pillars of EQ—self-awareness, self-regulation, motivation, empathy, and social skills—to navigate relationships better.

activities.name: Practice stress management
activities.description: Identify your stress triggers and experiment with coping techniques like deep breathing, exercise, or time in nature.

activities.name: Learn about business communication
activities.description: Improve your emails, meeting etiquette, and professional tone to communicate clearly and build credibility at work.

activities.name: Create a professional growth plan
activities.description: Set quarterly goals for skills, knowledge, and experiences that move you closer to your ideal professional self.

activities.name: Read a personal development book
activities.description: Pick a highly-rated book on habits, mindset, or productivity and commit to reading at least one chapter today.

activities.name: Practice positive self-talk
activities.description: Replace negative inner dialogue with affirming, realistic statements to build resilience and a healthier self-image.

activities.name: Learn about cognitive biases
activities.description: Explore common mental shortcuts like confirmation bias and anchoring so you can make more rational decisions.

activities.name: Develop a morning routine
activities.description: Design a consistent first-hour routine with movement, intention-setting, and focus to start every day with momentum.

activities.name: Practice saying no to unnecessary commitments
activities.description: Learn to set healthy boundaries by declining requests that don't align with your priorities or values.

activities.name: Learn time blocking techniques
activities.description: Assign dedicated blocks of time to specific tasks to protect your focus and eliminate context-switching.

activities.name: Study personality type frameworks
activities.description: Explore MBTI, Big Five, or Enneagram systems to better understand your strengths, blind spots, and communication style.

activities.name: Practice journaling for self-reflection
activities.description: Write freely about your thoughts, goals, and experiences to gain clarity, process emotions, and track personal growth.

activities.name: Learn about habit formation science
activities.description: Understand the cue–routine–reward loop and strategies like habit stacking to build lasting positive behaviours.

categories.description: Become the best version of yourself. These activities push you to reflect, set meaningful goals, build better habits, and grow in wisdom and self-awareness.

categories.name: Home Improvement

activities.name: Organize a closet or storage space
activities.description: Sort items into keep, donate, and discard piles, then arrange what remains with bins and labels for easy access.

activities.name: Deep clean one room in your home
activities.description: Go beyond surface tidying—scrub corners, wipe baseboards, and refresh soft furnishings for a truly spotless space.

activities.name: Learn basic plumbing fixes
activities.description: Watch tutorials on fixing leaky taps, unclogging drains, and replacing washers to handle common issues yourself.

activities.name: Research energy efficiency upgrades
activities.description: Investigate LED lighting, smart thermostats, and insulation improvements that can lower your energy bills.

activities.name: Create a home maintenance checklist
activities.description: Build a seasonal schedule for HVAC filters, gutter cleaning, and other tasks that prevent costly repairs.

activities.name: Learn to patch drywall
activities.description: Master filling small holes and cracks with spackle, sanding smooth, and touching up paint for a seamless finish.

activities.name: Research smart home devices
activities.description: Compare smart speakers, plugs, cameras, and locks to find devices that add convenience and security to your home.

activities.name: Plan a furniture rearrangement
activities.description: Sketch different layouts to improve traffic flow, maximise natural light, and give your room a fresh feel.

activities.name: Learn basic electrical safety
activities.description: Understand your breaker panel, safe wattage limits, and when to call a professional to avoid electrical hazards.

activities.name: Start a home inventory for insurance
activities.description: Document your possessions room-by-room with photos, values, and receipts so you're prepared if you need to file a claim.

categories.description: Transform your living space into somewhere you love. These projects range from quick fixes to satisfying upgrades that add comfort, beauty, and value to your home.

categories.name: Health & Fitness

activities.name: Create a weekly workout plan
activities.description: Design a balanced training schedule mixing cardio, strength, and rest days tailored to your fitness level and goals.

activities.name: Research healthy meal prep ideas
activities.description: Find nutritious, batch-friendly recipes you can cook on Sunday to fuel your week with minimal daily effort.

activities.name: Learn proper stretching techniques
activities.description: Study dynamic warm-ups and static cool-downs to improve flexibility, prevent injury, and speed up recovery.

activities.name: Research ergonomic workspace setups
activities.description: Learn optimal desk height, monitor distance, and chair adjustments to reduce strain during long work sessions.

activities.name: Create a sleep improvement plan
activities.description: Audit your sleep habits and set up a routine with consistent times, reduced screen exposure, and a restful environment.

activities.name: Learn about macro nutrition tracking
activities.description: Understand proteins, carbs, and fats, and learn to log your intake to align your diet with your health goals.

activities.name: Research posture correction exercises
activities.description: Find targeted exercises for your upper back, core, and hip flexors to counteract the effects of sitting all day.

activities.name: Create a hydration tracking system
activities.description: Set daily water goals and use a simple tracker or app to ensure you're drinking enough throughout the day.

activities.name: Learn about heart rate zone training
activities.description: Understand the five heart rate zones and how training in each one targets fat burn, endurance, or peak performance.

activities.name: Research stress-reduction techniques
activities.description: Explore evidence-based methods like progressive muscle relaxation, box breathing, and nature walks to lower your stress levels.

categories.description: Take care of the body that carries you through life. From workouts to wellness routines, these activities support your physical health, energy levels, and overall vitality.
